summary: Completed testing of BUG FIX (services.service.js migration) and NEW FEATURE (ephemeral demo users). All tests passed - 12/12 backend tests, all frontend flows working.
critical_code_review_comments: services.service.js correctly migrated from raw axios+broken token to api instance with withCredentials:true
routes_demo.py properly implements ephemeral user generation with 24h expiry after first login
server.py login function correctly handles ephemeral user expiry check and first_login_at activation
All data-testid attributes present in inscription components for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - demo users are ephemeral and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) BUG FIX: Inscription step 2 now shows services grid with 8 Directions Générales (DGA, DGETFP, DGPD, DGEG, DGEC, DGCFEE, DGTIC, DDR). 2) NEW FEATURE: Ephemeral demo users can be generated (POST /api/demo/generer), listed (GET /api/demo/liste), and deleted (DELETE /api/demo/supprimer). Demo users have 24h validity after first login. 3) REGRESSION: Minister login works correctly.

details: Navigate to /inscription, fill step 1 form and submit
Step 2 loads with services grid showing 8 Directions Générales
DGA service card visible and selectable
services.service.js now uses api instance with withCredentials:true
POST /api/demo/generer with {nombre: 3, service_code: 'DGA', password: 'Demo2026!'} creates Test01, Test02, Test03
Response includes phone numbers (+243 900 000 01, etc.) and common password
Demo user Test01 can login with +243 900 000 01 / Demo2026!
First login activates 24h timer (first_login_at and expires_at set)
Dashboard loads with statistics and charts
